recent_changes.description: Provided updated InstructorUIController with DRAFT version and Section/Lesson queries
Resolved 403 CSRF issue by injecting CSRF tokens into main-layout.html and Javascript headers

errors_encountered.solution: Spring Security CSRF protection blocked the Javascript fetch. Fixed by passing _csrf header
InstructorUIController only passed courseId. Must fetch CourseVersion (DRAFT) and pass to Model to pre-fill HTML

decisions_made.reason: Since Thymeleaf is already used, it's easier to fetch Draft, Sections, and Lessons in Controller and loop them via th:each in Tab 2 rather than fetching via AJAX on load
